howItWorks.intro: This ai agent cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Cost per Task = Steps × Tokens per Step × Average Token Rate
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much do AI agents cost to run?
faq.answer: A single agent task using Sonnet with 15 steps at 5K tokens/step costs roughly $0.67. At 50 tasks/day, that is about $33/day or $1,000/month.

faq.question: How to reduce AI agent costs?
faq.answer: Use Haiku for simple subtasks, cache repeated context, limit maximum steps, and use smaller models for routing and classification tasks.

faq.question: Is the AI Agent Cost Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What avg steps per task should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate avg steps per task value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the AI Agent Cost Calculator?
sections.body: The AI Agent Cost Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your avg steps per task, tokens per step, tasks per day, you get instant results including tokens per task, cost per task, daily cost. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting tokens per task right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your avg steps per task and need to find the right tokens per task. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Avg Steps per Task
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your avg steps per task — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: tokens per step, tasks per day, model, days per month. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your tokens per task, cost per task, daily cost. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your avg steps per task before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
